blocks.text: Inspect the drive shaft (A) for deformation or cracks. If any abnormality is found, replace the drive shaft. Inspect the inboard joint (B) and outboard joint (C) for cracks. If cracks are found, replace the inboard joint or outboard joint with Assy. Hold the inboard joint by hand and turn the front wheel back and forth to inspect for rattling. If there is any abnormal rattling, replace the inboard joint or outboard joint as an assembly.

Inspect the inboard boot (A) and outboard boot (B) for cracks or damage. If abnormal, replace inboard or outboard boot and boot band (C). Inspect the boot band for looseness and grease leakage. If loose or leaking grease is found, replace the boot band.
